title: Introduction to Retrieval-Augmented Generation
author: Alice Johnson
summary: A comprehensive overview of RAG systems, covering vector stores, embedding models, and hybrid retrieval strategies.

title: Practical Vector Databases
author: Bob Chen
summary: Hands-on guide to deploying and tuning HNSW-based approximate nearest-neighbour indexes for production workloads.

title: BM25 and Beyond
author: Carol Martinez
summary: Deep dive into term-frequency-based ranking, from classic BM25 through learned sparse retrieval.

title: Chunking Strategies for Long Documents
author: David Kim
summary: Compares fixed-size, sentence-boundary, and structure-aware chunking approaches and their effect on retrieval precision.

title: Hybrid Search with RRF
author: Eva Novak
summary: Explains Reciprocal Rank Fusion and shows how combining sparse and dense retrieval signals improves recall across diverse queries.
